name: MSI MPG Z790I EDGE WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3 (Z790IEDGE)
